reference: I am twenty-nine years old, trying to conceive, having mild polycystic ovary syndrome, first cycle of clomiphene citrate taken on days five-nine. I am undergoing a follicular study. On day thirteen, my doctor injected me with human chorionic gonadotropin injection. It is day fifteen; the follicle size is twenty-three-twenty-one millimeters, and the endometrium is eight millimeters. When am I likely to ovulate?
text: I am 29 years old, trying to conceive, having mild polycystic ovary syndrome, first cycle of clomiphene citrate taken on days 5 and 9. I am undergoing a follicular study; on day 13 my doctor injected me with human chorionic gonadotropin injection. It is day 15; the follicle size is 23-21 mm, and the endometrium is 8 mm. When am I likely to ovulate?
